query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.productLane,
  p.projectState,
  p.sector,
  p.stageCode,
  p.value,
  p.priority,
  p.suppressed,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  p.notes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as nu_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_contact_no_email' AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as ncne_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.id IN (
  '690089', -- Cadia
  '570022', -- Inland Rail Euroa
  '330035', -- Delburn Wind Farm
  '210007', -- Multiple Renewables 1.2GW
  '330033', -- Flint Project
  '660020', -- TasWater Green Point STP
  '330017', -- TasWater Network Overhaul
  '120346', -- Melbourne Water Sewer Rehab
  '120267', -- SEA 1180 OPVs
  '210028', -- Marinus Link
  '120348'  -- Olympic Dam (BHP)
)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority, p.suppressed, p.discoveryStatus, p.lifecycleStatus, p.notes
ORDER BY sr_count DESC;
